violations.text: Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (deli meat) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
Wire racks were observed lined with cardboard. Areas where food preparation occurs must be constructed of smooth, durable, and non-absorbent material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the stand up 2 door fridge, the prep unit across from the grill line, and grill cooler. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Deli Slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Items were observed uncovered in freezer. Food items in freezer must remain covered to prevent contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Wire racks were observed lined with cardboard. Areas where food preparation occurs must be constructed of smooth, durable, and non-absorbent material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit across from the pizza oven. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The floor in the kitchen was observed with tiles in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023

Ham located in the walk-in unit; was observed marked with a date that exceeded the 7 days limit for ready to eat foods. Food item dated 11/18/23. Food item was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
